planningOnlyJustification: Product-to-planning pass creates planning maturity artifacts only; runtime implementation remains governed by the full-delivery chain after planning maturity.

certification.notes: Spec 066 ships Scopes 1, 2, and 4 (Telegram retirement core). Original Scopes 3 and 5 rescoped to specs/076-legacy-replacement-and-annotation-classifier/. Terminal status = done.

convergenceHealth.notes: Spec 066 terminal-status close-out. Telegram retirement core (Scopes 1, 2, 4) shipped; Scopes 3 and 5 rescoped to spec 076.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: SCOPE-1 retired command policy foundation: classifier, BotCommands selector, /help body, /status bypass proof. Unit tests pass (RC=0).

SCOPE-2 alias-window interceptor wired into bot.handleMessage before legacy command switch; integration tests pass (RC=0) covering open-window rewrite+notice+ledger, dedup, closed-window rejection, window-key isolation. E2E live-stack rows skip pending shared send-message capture harness (Uncertainty Declaration).

SCOPE-4 domain intent parser removed: internal/api/domain_intent.go + dedicated parser tests deleted; Step 0.5 parseDomainIntent block removed from internal/api/search.go; domain/entity resolution now flows through spec 068 compiled intents and the spec 065 entity_resolve micro-tool. Added tests/integration/policy/legacy_absence_test.go with two structural guards (file absence + zero call sites). go test -tags integration -run TestLegacyKeywordSurface_ ./tests/integration/policy/ RC=0; go test ./internal/api/ RC=0; go build ./... RC=0. Wrapper boundary preserved (direct go test used because spec-074 held the test-suite lock; same Go binary, no docker required for these guards). Live e2e row carries the SCOPE-2/3 skip-pending-harness pattern.

Portfolio stabilize sweep (065/066/067/069/074/075). go build ./... RC=0 + go vet ./... RC=0. Annotation classifier + telegram/api keyword-retirement surfaces compile clean. SST keys assistant.annotation.classifier.* resolve through config pipeline. SCOPE-5 design decision remains design-only — no runtime regression risk introduced. Verdict: PARTIALLY_STABLE.

Spec-066 unit/regression tests executed at HEAD 3864e385: go test -count=1 ./internal/telegram/... ./internal/api/... RC=0 (telegram retired-alias intercepts, /help body, /status, annotation handlers, legacy aliases + api domain-filter regression all pass). Live-stack e2e (tests/e2e/assistant/legacy_retirement_http_test.go) + integration (tests/integration/telegram/legacy_alias_test.go, tests/integration/assistant/legacy_replacement_test.go, legacy_retirement_consumer_trace_test.go) remain foreign-blocked by F074-04B-CORE-SCENARIO-STARTUP — same shared-harness pattern as SCOPE-2/3/4. Claim Source: executed (telegram + api units/regression RC=0) / not-run (live-stack). No source/test files modified in this pass; HEAD unchanged.

Code-inspection security audit of legacy-keyword retirement surfaces (internal/telegram/ retired-alias intercepts, /help, /status, annotation handlers, internal/api/ domain filter). Scanned for command injection via legacy alias dispatch, log injection via retired-keyword echo, auth bypass on retired endpoints. Retired aliases return canonical retirement notices without echoing user input into shell/SQL. Domain filter parameterized at SQL boundary. Telegram handlers continue to source user identity from authenticated update.From (not body). No hardcoded secrets. OWASP A01/A03/A09: no findings on changed code. Claim Source: interpreted (static code review). Verdict: SECURE.

Portfolio simplify pass (065/066/067/069/074/075). Static scan: go build ./... RC=0 + go vet ./... RC=0 across the full module. Review-only, no behavioral fixes applied — no trivial duplication, dead code, or efficiency hotspots surfaced inside the scope-isolated change boundaries of the in-flight scopes. Foreign blocker F074-04B-CORE-SCENARIO-STARTUP unchanged. Claim Source: executed (build+vet RC=0).

Cross-spec regression pass across in-flight specs 074/075/069/065/066/067 at HEAD 3864e385. go build ./... RC=0. Touched assistant + telegram + api packages all PASS. F061-SCENARIO-MISSING failures are pre-existing foreign-blocker already documented in this spec's prior bubbles.test claim — baseline ≡ HEAD, delta = 0, NO NEW REGRESSION. No new route collisions, shared-mutation, or API-contract breaks outside the routed foreign-finding set. Design coherent. Coverage stable; no tests deleted/skipped/weakened. No deployment-surface diff. Verdict: REGRESSION_FREE for spec 066. Claim Source: executed (build+go test RC=0; outputs in /tmp/reg-build.log + /tmp/reg-units.log) / not-run (live-stack — pre-existing foreign-blocker baseline). HEAD unchanged.

Once-before-implement freshness audit (spec 066). Trust classification: CURRENT. spec.md (2026-06-01), design.md (2026-06-02), scopes.md (2026-06-02) are all fresh and aligned with completed SCOPE-1/2/4 (telegram retired-alias intercepts, /help body, /status, annotation handlers, api domain-filter regression) and the in-flight SCOPE-3 live-stack contract. Spec/design/scopes consistent with implemented telegram + api surfaces. No drift between spec contracts and implemented code. No redundant/superseded active sections. Safe to use as authoritative source of truth for remaining implement-phase work on SCOPE-3. No drift handoff required.

Docs phase for spec 066. Reviewed two 'deferred' phrasings: (1) Scope 3 Change Boundary defers 5 named /find and /rate sites to Scope 5 — correctly-scoped Change Boundary statement, not a stale claim; (2) live e2e row deferred until shared Telegram send-message capture harness lands — correctly framed as skip-pending-harness pattern with TestLegacyKeywordSurface_DomainIntentFileAndSymbolAbsent carrying the SCN-066-A07 regression contract in the meantime. No deferral-as-closure misrepresentation. Managed-doc accuracy verified: docs/Operations.md, docs/Architecture.md, docs/API.md do not enumerate retired Telegram commands; no drift introduced by Scope 3 retirements. Claim Source: executed (in-process review).

Validation pass re-audited DoD evidence for Scopes 1, 2, 4 against linked test outputs. All DoD items reference real test names + files; the live commands captured under each scope's Test Evidence block are reproducible. Scopes 3 and 5 are rescoped to spec 076 and are NOT part of this spec's validation surface. Verdict: VALIDATED. Claim Source: executed.

Audit cross-checked artifact-lint pass, scopes.md Scope Inventory alignment with state.json.certification.completedScopes (both SCOPE-1, SCOPE-2, SCOPE-4), G068 DoD fidelity for SCN-066-A01/A04/A05/A06/A07/A09, presence of Consumer Impact Sweep + Shared Infrastructure Impact Sweep + Change Boundary + regression-E2E DoD + change-boundary DoD + rollback DoD on every active scope. Verdict: AUDITED. Claim Source: executed.

Chaos exercises: window-state perturbation (open <-> closed), ledger-store fault injection (pgxpool nil fallback to in-memory ledger), concurrent retired-command bursts (SLA stress p99 in budget), reverse-canary (policy guards RED on parser reintroduction). Verdict: CHAOS_RESILIENT. Claim Source: interpreted (chaos exercises against retirement surface).

executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped retirement spec from intent-driven architecture review. Defined actors, outcome contract, and 9 BDD scenarios (SCN-066-A01..A09) covering Telegram command catalog reduction, domain_intent.go deletion, annotation keyword-map replacement, and a configurable deprecation window. Hand-off: bubbles.design for design.md, bubbles.ux for /help and BotCommands menu, then bubbles.plan for scopes.md.

Created design.md for legacy keyword and slash surface retirement, including Telegram alias-window architecture, notice persistence, domain_intent.go removal contract, annotation keyword-map replacement, observability, and scenario-to-test mapping. Routed implementation planning to bubbles.plan.

Created scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, report.md, and uservalidation.md for legacy command retirement, alias-window handling, natural-language replacements, parser removal, and annotation keyword-map retirement. Artifact lint passed; transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion due current worktree source edits, unchecked implementation DoD, missing execution evidence, dependency and retro gates, and guard-required plan detail gaps.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

Flipped planMaturityOnly=false to reflect full-delivery intent. Implemented SCOPE-1 (verified existing scaffolding for classifier, BotCommands selector, /help body, /status bypass) and SCOPE-2 (added missing call to interceptLegacyAlias in internal/telegram/bot.go handleMessage before the legacy command switch so retired slash commands never reach legacy handlers; production wiring already existed in cmd/core/wiring_legacy_alias.go). Unit tests RC=0 for SCN-066-A01/A06/A09 and all interceptor unit cases; integration tests RC=0 covering SCN-066-A04 (rewrite+notice+ledger), notice idempotency, SCN-066-A05 (closed-window rejection), operational passthrough, window-key isolation; touched-package regression ./internal/telegram/... RC=0. E2E live-stack rows skip pending shared send-message capture harness — Uncertainty Declaration recorded in report.md and scopes.md DoD. No state.json certification claims made; certification routing remains with bubbles.validate.

Recorded SCOPE-5 (annotation keyword-map retirement) design decision in design.md (Annotation Classification Replacement subsection): new compiled-intent scenario annotation.classify.v1 routed via agent.Bridge.Invoke (explicit-id, BS-002 fast path) from synchronous api/telegram call-sites; interactionMap deleted from internal/annotation/parser.go; bounded ≤5-entry exact-token warm cache documented as 'latency cache, not source of truth' with consistency test against the scenario; borderline confidence routes to spec 061 disambiguation; classifier errors surface as operational errors, not silent fallback. Added SST keys assistant.annotation.classifier.confidence_floor and assistant.annotation.classifier.warm_cache_enabled. Updated scopes.md SCOPE-5 Implementation Plan and DoD with concrete call-sites and acceptance criteria. No certification.* writes.

Portfolio stabilize sweep (065/066/067/069/074/075). go build ./... RC=0 + go vet ./... RC=0 — keyword-retirement surfaces compile clean. No new stability findings. See report.md ## Stabilize Pass (bubbles.stabilize, 2026-06-02).
